title: AI Tool of the Week: a smart assistant that automates your weekly workflows
summary: Set recurring tasks in plain language and let ChatGPT monitor the web, check connected apps, and deliver AI-generated updates automatically.

title: Using Local Coding Agents
summary: Using Open-Weight Models in Local Coding Harnesses as an Alternative to Claude Code and Codex Subscriptions
author: Sebastian Raschka, PhD

title: AI images are more convincing than ever — infiltrating journals and undermining trust in science
summary: Thanks to AI, one of the key pillars of scientific evidence — stunning imagery that often defies belief — is crumbling.
author: Nan Li

title: Create Beautiful Website With 3 Steps Using AI
summary:
Vibe-coded sites look like slop for a reason. Claude doesn't have visual taste by default.

The Design Skill fixes that. Claude learns to make visual decisions first. Before it writes a single line.

Then add 21st Dev via MCP. Real components. Real design decisions. Not slop.

Like giving your builder a style guide. Before they build anything.

One setup. Claude stops generating slop. Starts building with taste.

#claudecode #21stdev #vibecoding #webdesign #github
author: Jack Roberts
